discussions.title: Two college kids raise a $5.1 million pre-seed to build an AI social network in iMessage
discussions.snippet: Series, a social networking app that's grown popular on college campuses, announced a $5.1 million pre-seed round from some big names in tech.

discussions.title: X-energy stock pops 27% on first day of trading following upsized IPO

discussions.title: ComfyUI hits $500M valuation as creators seek more control over AI-generated media

discussions.title: X launches stand-alone XChat app on iOS

discussions.title: Nuclear startup X-energy raises $1B in data center-driven IPO
discussions.snippet: Amazon-backed X-energy was able to raise around 20% more money in its IPO as demand for nuclear power surges.

discussions.title: The person who allegedly leaked Paramount’s new Avatar movie has been arrested
discussions.snippet: Following Paramount Skydance's move to launch an investigation into how its upcoming Avatar Aang: The Last Airbender animated feature leaked onto the internet, a suspect has been taken into custody by police.

discussions.title: 360-degree cameras have a new superpower
discussions.snippet: Insta360, the leading maker of 360-degree cameras, is now partnered with a 12-person UK startup called Splatica to help creators do just that.
